name: American Samoa Department of Commerce Business Licensing
termsReviewNotes: No dedicated access, reuse, or website terms page was found in the official Department of Commerce business-license page or its public navigation during the 2026-06-27 review. Keep redistribution and automation status unknown and request agency guidance before reuse.
updateFrequency: unknown; verify with the American Samoa Department of Commerce before relying on freshness assumptions
licenseTypesIncluded: American Samoa business licenses that may include construction or contractor activity categories
knownExclusions: This is not confirmed as a contractor-specific public lookup source.
License categories, public search availability, and construction-specific fields require follow-up research.
Professional board, permit, tax, and enforcement records may require separate official sources.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. Future work should confirm whether a public lookup, report, or public-records request path exists before automating access.
publicRecordsNotes: Official business-licensing source metadata only. Absence from this source is not proof that a contractor license, business license, permit, or authorization does not exist elsewhere.
officialLookupReviewNotes: The official business-license page describes application requirements but did not expose a stable public contractor-specific license lookup during the 2026-06-27 review.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: No official bulk download has been confirmed in this phase.
researchNotes: Registry-only source for American Samoa business licensing. Future work should determine whether construction businesses have a public-records export or a contractor-specific licensing board source.
maintainerNotes: Keep this entry framed as territory business-licensing metadata, not as a verified contractor-license lookup.
